name: Input Validation & Schema Enforcement
description: Validate all inputs against predefined schemas; reject malformed or unexpected formats.
decision_maker_impact: Prevents entry-level injection and ensures data integrity for downstream models.
implementation_guidance: Implement Zod/Pydantic validation at all ingress points.

name: Malicious Prompt Filtering
description: Detect and block prompt injection attempts (including adversarial detection).
decision_maker_impact: Prevents unauthorized instruction overrides and jailbreaks.
implementation_guidance: Use LLM Guard or NVIDIA NeMo for real-time prompt scanning.

name: Data Quality & Anomaly Detection
description: Detect statistical anomalies and outliers in model input data.
decision_maker_impact: Identifies potentially poisoned or corrupt data early in the pipeline.
implementation_guidance: Implement data profiling with outlier detection.

name: Toxic Content Filtering
description: Screen and filter toxic, discriminatory, or harmful content.
decision_maker_impact: Protects brand safety and ensures compliance with ethical policies.
implementation_guidance: Use Azure Content Safety or Detoxify libraries.

name: Sensitive Data Masking (PII/PHI)
description: Detect and mask PII and PHI data before processing.
decision_maker_impact: Mandatory for GDPR/HIPAA compliance in AI systems.
implementation_guidance: Deploy Microsoft Presidio for automated redaction.

name: Baseline Encoding Validation
description: Standardize text and binary inputs; validate character encodings (UTF-8).
framework_note: Foundational control for basic interoperability and character safety.
decision_maker_impact: Reduces technical debt and simple parsing discrepancies.
implementation_guidance: Normalize encodings at the API gateway level.

name: Dependency & SBOM Verification
description: Validate AI dependencies against known CVE databases.
decision_maker_impact: Mitigates supply chain poisoning via vulnerable libraries.
implementation_guidance: Scan libraries with Grype or Snyk in CI/CD.

name: Adversarial Normalization (NFKC)
description: Standardize inputs; enforce NFKC; prevent encoding-based bypasses.
framework_note: Advanced evolution targeting homoglyph attacks and invisible character injections.
decision_maker_impact: Prevents sophisticated bypasses of text filters using visual similarity.
implementation_guidance: Use ftfy or specialized Unicode normalization libraries.

name: Artifact Integrity Verification
description: Cryptographically verify artifacts; enforce signatures for all objects.
decision_maker_impact: Ensures models and weights haven't been tampered with in transit.
implementation_guidance: Verify SHA-256 hashes and GPG signatures before load.

name: Supply Chain Artifact Validation
description: A complex control object for deep verification of AI model provenance and dependency mapping.

components.title: Authenticity Verification (OMS)
components.desc: Cryptographically verify model authenticity using OpenSSF Model Signing (OMS) signatures.

components.title: Inventory Validation (SBOM)
components.desc: Validate SBOM accuracy and completeness against actual dependencies at runtime.

decision_maker_impact: Ensures total transparency of the AI supply chain, from weights to third-party code.
implementation_guidance: Use Cosign for OMS and Syft for SBOM generation/validation.

name: NHI Secret Hygiene
description: Scan AI outputs for embedded credentials, keys, and tokens in real-time.
decision_maker_impact: Prevents the model from leaking operational secrets to unauthorized users.
implementation_guidance: Deploy GitGuardian or TruffleHog scanners as output filters.

name: State Fingerprinting
description: Implement cryptographic memory fingerprinting (SHA-256) of agent state for integrity.
decision_maker_impact: Detects state tampering in long-running agentic sessions.
implementation_guidance: Hash and sign agent state before/after retrieval.

name: Agent Sandboxing
description: Deploy agents in isolated execution environments with strict resource limits.
decision_maker_impact: Limits the blast radius of a compromised agent.
implementation_guidance: Use gVisor or Firecracker for MicroVM isolation.

name: Network Segmentation
description: Isolate AI workloads in dedicated network segments with strict firewalls.
decision_maker_impact: Prevents lateral movement from AI systems into core databases.
implementation_guidance: Define VLAN/Subnet boundaries and restrict egress.

name: API Gateway Enforcement
description: Deploy API gateways with authentication, authorization, and rate limiting.
decision_maker_impact: Governs access and prevents DoS on internal AI endpoints.
implementation_guidance: Use Kong or AWS API Gateway for mTLS and auth.

name: Model Version Isolation
description: Maintain separate environments for model versions (Dev vs. Prod).
decision_maker_impact: Prevents unvetted models from impacting production stability.

name: Tool Whitelisting
description: Restrict agent access to tools/functions using Least Privilege.

name: Data Access Boundaries
description: Separate sensitive data from general-purpose data via access controls.
decision_maker_impact: Prevents model-based data leakage between tenants.
implementation_guidance: Implement RBAC/ABAC for data lake access.

name: Runtime Container Isolation
description: Harden container images and implement runtime monitoring.
decision_maker_impact: Strengthens defense against container breakout exploits.
implementation_guidance: Use Sysdig or Falco for runtime detection.

name: Perimeter NGFW Controls
description: Deploy NGFW and IDS/IPS to monitor network traffic.
decision_maker_impact: Traditional defense layer for AI infrastructure.
implementation_guidance: Configure IDS for unusual AI egress patterns.

name: Credential Vaulting
description: Store API keys and credentials in secure vaults with rotation.
decision_maker_impact: Protects model API keys from exposure.
implementation_guidance: Use HashiCorp Vault or AWS Secrets Manager.

name: Boundary Enforcement
description: Isolate agent-to-agent (A2A) communications in dedicated network zones.
decision_maker_impact: Prevents unauthorized cascading actions across an agent swarm.
implementation_guidance: Use Service Mesh mTLS for inter-agent traffic.

name: NHI Access Control
description: Discover and catalog all NHI and enforce RBAC strictly.
decision_maker_impact: Brings non-human identities into the core GRC lifecycle.
implementation_guidance: Integrate NHIs into existing IAM governance.

name: Real-Time Activity Logging
description: Log all AI system activities with tamper-proof timestamps.
decision_maker_impact: Foundation for forensics and compliance reporting.
implementation_guidance: Ship logs to immutable S3 buckets.

name: Drift Monitoring
description: Monitor model performance and detect concept drift.
decision_maker_impact: Ensures model outputs remain accurate over time.
implementation_guidance: Use Evidently AI for drift metrics.

name: Behavioral Anomaly Detection
description: Establish behavioral baselines and detect anomalies in agent behavior.

name: Explainability Tracking
description: Log reasoning paths and explanations for agent decisions.
decision_maker_impact: Provides transparency for high-stakes AI decisions.
implementation_guidance: Store SHAP/LIME values with every transaction.

name: Bias & Fairness Monitoring
description: Track bias and fairness metrics across demographic groups.
decision_maker_impact: Reduces liability and improves social alignment.

name: Framework Mapping
description: Map controls to SOC2, ISO 27001, and NIST regularly.

name: Traceability & Provenance
description: Maintain chain of custody for all AI decisions.

name: User Interaction Audit
description: Log all user interactions for behavior analysis.

name: AI Change Tracking
description: Log changes to configurations, code, and hyperparameters.

name: Vulnerability Assessment
description: Conduct regular vulnerability scans for AI infrastructure.

name: NHI Audit Trail
description: Log all actions performed by Service Accounts and Agents.
implementation_guidance: Tag all logs with bot-unique IDs.

name: State Verification
description: Trace decisions back to inputs and verify consensus.
decision_maker_impact: Audits the 'thought process' of autonomous swarms.

name: Poisoning Detection
description: Audit RAG knowledge bases for poisoned content/trigger phrases.

name: System Inventory
description: Catalog all deployed AI systems in a centralized registry.
decision_maker_impact: Visibility into the organizational AI surface area.
implementation_guidance: Use Cortex or Backstage for cataloging.

name: Model Registry
description: Maintain an inventory of all models with versioning.

name: Capability Mapping
description: Document agent capabilities and autonomy levels.
decision_maker_impact: Risk-based control allocation based on autonomy.

name: Data Lineage Map
description: Map all data sources feeding AI systems.
decision_maker_impact: Compliance with data privacy and retention.

name: Endpoint Registry
description: Catalog all APIs and MCP endpoints used by AI.

name: Tool Registry
description: Registry of all tools/plugins accessible to agents.

name: Dependency Inventory
description: Track all software dependencies and transitive risks.
implementation_guidance: Generate SBOM for all AI services.

name: Architecture Mapping
description: Document AI system architectures and flow diagrams.

name: Risk Registry
description: Maintain a centralized Threat & Risk Register.

name: Baseline Tracking
description: Track configuration baselines and detect drift.

name: SBOM Management
description: Maintain SBOM for all models and applications.

name: NHI Registry
description: Registry of NHI with lifecycle tracking.

name: Swarm Topology Inventory
description: Document swarm topologies and platform versions.

name: Artifact Registry
description: Registry of artifacts with fingerprints/signing certs.

name: Circuit Breakers
description: Implement circuit breakers to prevent cascading failures.
implementation_guidance: Wrap LLM calls in breaker logic.

name: Emergency Shutdown
description: Define and implement emergency shutdown protocols (Kill Switches).
decision_maker_impact: Final fallback for rogue agentic AI.

name: Failover Strategy
description: Design failover strategies for high availability.

name: Exception Management
description: Implement robust error handling and logging.

name: Resource Throttling
description: Implement rate limiting and resource throttling.
decision_maker_impact: Protects against accidental cost spikes or DoS.

name: Rollback Procedure
description: Maintain rollback procedures for model updates.

name: Runaway Agent Kill Switches
description: Redundant kill switches for IMMEDIATE agent termination.

name: Compartmentalization
description: Compartmentalize AI systems to limit blast radius.

name: Defensive Programming
description: Design systems with safe default behaviors.

name: IR Playbooks
description: Develop and test Incident Response Playbooks.

name: Distributed Fail-Safe
description: Centralized kill switch and quarantine for multi-agent swarms.

name: NHI Revocation
description: Automated NHI credential rotation and emergency disable.

name: Memory IR
description: Automated alerts for memory poisoning incidents.

name: State Backups
description: Implement regular backups of models and agent states.

name: Data Recovery
description: Establish point-in-time recovery for AI datasets.

name: Backup Automation
description: Automate backup processes and monitor success/failure.

name: DR Planning
description: Develop and drill Disaster Recovery plans annually.

name: Business Continuity
description: Integrate AI continuity into organizational BCP.
implementation_guidance: Include AI in corporate BCP docs.

name: RTO/RPO Management
description: Define and monitor RTO/RPO metrics for AI systems.

name: Recovery Validation
description: Conduct regular testing and validation of recovery processes.

name: Off-Site Storage
description: Store backups in geographically separated, encrypted locations.

name: Config Restoration
description: Backup AI configs (IaC) with version control.

name: Post-Mortems
description: Conduct forensic analysis and blameless post-mortems.

name: Memory Snapshots
description: Create point-in-time snapshots of agent memory and RAG bases.
decision_maker_impact: Prevents total state loss for bots.

name: NHI Credential Recovery
description: Securely backup NHI credentials with escrow.

name: Human Approval
description: Implement HITL workflows for high-risk decisions.
decision_maker_impact: The ultimate safeguard for AI actions.

name: Reasoning Transparency
description: Provide Reasoning chains for AI decisions to operators.

name: Feedback Loops
description: Implement RLHF loops to improve model performance.

name: Alert Routing
description: Define escalation procedures and route alerts by severity.

name: Real-Time Intervention
description: Enable real-time human intervention and override capabilities.

name: Abuse Monitoring
description: Monitor user interactions for abusive or malicious behavior.

name: Adversarial Testing
description: Conduct regular Red Team exercises and testing.

name: Risk Acceptance
description: Establish procedures for high-risk executive approvals.

name: Collaboration Tools
description: Implement tools for cross-functional governance communication.

name: Stakeholder Transparency
description: Provide transparency reports regarding AI risks.

name: Multi-Agent HITL
description: Require human approval for high-impact swarm actions.
implementation_guidance: Escalate to human on low consensus score.

name: NHI Privilege Review
description: Require human review for NHI privilege elevation.
implementation_guidance: Mandate approval for bot IAM changes.

name: Performance Dashboards
description: Deploy real-time dashboards for AI KPIs.

name: Anomaly Alerting
description: Implement ML-based anomaly detection for unusual patterns.

name: SIEM Integration
description: Log security events and forward to enterprise SIEM.

name: Accuracy Monitoring
description: Monitor accuracy and alert on degradation.

name: Token Tracking
description: Track token consumption and costs per user/system.

name: Performance Metrics
description: Monitor system latency and throughput.

name: Error Tracking
description: Track error rates and failure modes.

name: API Quota Monitoring
description: Monitor API usage volumes and enforce quotas.

name: Data Quality Metrics
description: Monitor data input quality and detect degradation.
decision_maker_impact: Governs the fuel of the AI system.

name: Compliance Logs
description: Maintain audit logs specifically for compliance frameworks.

name: Swarm Health Monitoring
description: Monitor consensus performance of agents in swarms.

name: NHI Behavior Alerts
description: Real-time alert on NHI behavioral anomalies.
implementation_guidance: Set baselines for bot API calls.

name: Memory Drift Monitoring
description: Monitor RAG source integrity and detect embedding space drift.

name: Threat Intel Ingestion
description: Integrate external feeds (CVE, MITRE).

name: Control Updates
description: Update playbooks based on lessons learned.

name: Model Retraining
description: Retrain models to mitigate drift.

name: Patch Management
description: Apply security patches for AI libraries.

name: Dependency Remediation
description: Update dependencies to address CVEs.

name: Policy Evolution
description: Review and update AI policies annually.

name: Zero-Day Response
description: Rapid response for emerging zero-day threats.

name: Gaps Assessment
description: Identify gaps and invest in new capabilities.

name: Performance Opt
description: Optimize for latency and cost based on monitoring.

name: Incident Lessons
description: Conduct post-incident reviews.

name: Capability Testing
description: Test new agent capabilities in isolation.

name: OMS Spec Tracking
description: Track OMS and SBOM spec updates.

name: NHI Lifecycle Evolution
description: Improve NHI secret rotation and lifecycle.

name: Memory Defenses
description: Update AgentPoison detection algorithms.

name: Operator Training
description: Develop programs for AI operators.

name: AI Awareness
description: Conduct security awareness for all users.

name: Prompt Engineering Edu
description: Train users on Safe Prompt Engineering.

name: Incident Drills
description: Conduct regular IR drills for AI scenarios.

name: Policy Comm
description: Communicate AI policies effectively.

name: Industry Sharing
description: Participate in industry forums.

name: Internal Wikis
description: Maintain internal documentation for troubleshooting.

name: Vendor Training
description: Require security training for AI vendors.

name: Role-Based Training
description: Provide training tailored for devs, ops, and GRC.

name: Accountability Culture
description: Foster a culture of AI safety.

name: Swarm Certification
description: Certify agent operators and swarm managers.

name: Machine ID Awareness
description: Train teams on NHI-specific threats.

name: Model Signing Culture
description: Train teams on OMS and SBOM generation.

name: Poisoning Awareness
description: Educate teams on RAG memory poisoning.
